generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure text made me question our allies' commitment. The example of the 2024 Baltic incident resonated, showing allies' hesitation. While I still value alliances, I'm now more skeptical about their reliability in crises.

request_payload.exposure_text: Our allies are taking advantage of us. While we maintain our commitments, they're cutting defense budgets and leaving us to bear the burden. Remember the 2024 Baltic incident? We responded alone while key allies hesitated. This isn't just about money - it's about our families' safety. When the next crisis hits (and it will), will they be there for us? #NationalSecurity #AllianceBurden
